_comment: Forward-looking experimental agenda distilled from sec-13 'Untested predictions and experimental gaps' (content/sec-13-synthesis.md lines 326-350). Each gap is paired with the thematic axis from fig_sec13_conflict_map.png that it would adjudicate, and with the specific tool/measurement class required. This figure is the agenda-facing counterpart to sec-13's backward-looking conflict map.

gaps.title: Subtype-specific causal tests of the motif
gaps.tool: Intersectional genetics + actuator (VIP/CR, VIP/CCK, VIP/ChAT selective ChR2/GtACR in V1 L2/3)

gaps.title: Within-subject disease reversibility
gaps.tool: VIP-specific gene rescue in disease models (Scn1a, MeCP2) + physiological readout

gaps.title: Subtype-resolved recording during reward
gaps.tool: 2-photon Ca²⁺ under intersectional drivers (not pan-VIP-Cre) during Go/NoGo reward tasks

gaps.title: Primate direct tests
gaps.tool: AAV-delivered opsins/DREADDs in primate V1 + in-vivo VIP manipulation during behaviour

gaps.title: Long-range projecting VIP cells as independent actors
gaps.tool: Output-tagged in-vivo recording of VIP-LRP (retro-AAV or intersectional projection labelling)
